design_plan: rng=42; hero_math=1120px centered, 2–3 lines; AIDA checked; bento_density=grid-auto-flow:dense verified; labels swept for tracked competitors; button contrast AA+; hero/actions centered via flex+grid; CSS length >4200 chars
headline: AI agent to build websites — design, deploy, and iterate with real computer use

site_brief.audience: founders, operators, and creators who want an AI agent to build and publish websites
site_brief.goal: Create an indexable SEO use-case page in the /use-cases/ cluster. Target the practical query 'AI agent to build websites', show the exact job-to-be-done, and explain how Super can perform the workflow with real computer use and a reusable computer-use cache. Include sibling use-case links so the cluster feels intentional, crawlable, and useful.
site_brief.title: AI agent to build websites
site_brief.use_case_intent: show how Super can research, generate, push to GitHub, publish, and iterate website assets with real computer-use workflows

summary: An indexable /use-cases/ page showing how Super acts as an AI agent to build, publish, and iterate websites end‑to‑end using real computer control and a reusable computer-use cache. Written for founders, operators, and creators comparing modern AI website builders, agentic tools, and assistants like ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok, Siri, Folk, and Orchids.
